mapper.sql: URL_ID, URL_NAME, URL_PATTERN, HTTP_METHOD, ACTION_CODE, ARGS_CODE, LOGGED_DATA_CHANGED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATED_DATE
mapper.select:
SELECT URL_ID,URL_NAME,URL_NAME_EN,URL_PATTERN,HTTP_METHOD,ACTION_CODE,ARGS_CODE,LOGGED_DATA_CHANGED, GET_REAL_NAME(LAST_UPDATED_BY) AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_NAME,LAST_UPDATED_DATE FROM SYS_URL WHERE 1=1
AND INSTR(URL_NAME, #{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) > 0 OR INSTR(URL_NAME_EN,#{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ORDER BY LAST_UPDATED_DATE DESC, URL_ID DESC
mapper.insert: insert into sys_url (url_name,URL_NAME_EN, url_pattern, http_method, action_code, args_code, logged_data_changed, created_by, created_date, last_updated_by, last_updated_date) values (#{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{urlNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{urlPattern,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{argsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loggedDataChanged,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into sys_url
url_id,
url_name,
url_name_en,
url_pattern,
http_method,
action_code,
args_code,
logged_data_changed,
created_by,
created_date,
last_updated_by,
last_updated_date,
#{urlId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{urlNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{urlPattern,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{httpMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{actionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{argsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{loggedDataChanged,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update sys_url
url_name = #{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url_name_en = #{urlNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url_pattern = #{urlPattern,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
http_method = #{httpMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
action_code = #{actionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
args_code = #{argsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
logged_data_changed = #{loggedDataChanged,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_updated_by = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_updated_date = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where url_id = #{urlId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update sys_url set url_name = #{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url_name_en = #{urlNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url_pattern = #{urlPattern,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, http_method = #{httpMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, action_code = #{actionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, args_code = #{argsCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, logged_data_changed = #{loggedDataChanged,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_updated_by = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_updated_date = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where url_id = #{urlId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SYS_URL where URL_NAME = #{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND URL_ID != #{urlId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT r.role_id,sr.role_name, l.url_id, l.url_name, l.url_name_en, l.url_pattern, l.http_method, l.action_code, l.args_code, l.logged_data_changed FROM sys_fun_url f, sys_role_fun r, sys_url l, sys_role sr WHERE f.fun_id = r.fun_id AND f.url_id = l.url_id AND r.`ROLE_ID` = sr.`ROLE_ID` ORDER BY l.url_pattern DESC

select u.URL_ID,u.URL_NAME,u.URL_NAME_EN,u.URL_PATTERN,u.HTTP_METHOD,u.ACTION_CODE,u.ARGS_CODE,u.LOGGED_DATA_CHANGED from SYS_FUN_URL f, SYS_URL u where u.URL_ID = f.URL_ID and f.FUN_ID = #{funId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT u.URL_ID,u.URL_NAME,u.URL_NAME_EN,u.URL_PATTERN,u.HTTP_METHOD,u.ACTION_CODE,u.ARGS_CODE,u.LOGGED_DATA_CHANGED FROM SYS_URL u WHERE 1=1
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT a.URL_ID FROM SYS_URL a WHERE u.URL_ID = a.URL_ID AND a.URL_ID IN (${excepted}))
AND INSTR(u.URL_NAME, #{urlName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) > 0
ORDER BY u.LAST_UPDATED_DATE DESC, u.URL_ID DESC

select r.role_id, l.url_id, l.url_name, l.url_pattern,l.URL_NAME_EN, l.http_method, l.action_code, l.args_code, l.logged_data_changed from sys_fun_url f, sys_role_fun r, sys_url l WHERE f.fun_id = r.fun_id AND f.url_id = l.url_id AND l.http_method = #{method,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY l.url_pattern DESC
